chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2219 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1.For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 11250/13 3. For orders on M.A 11251/13 4. For hearing of main case 26.02.2019 Mr. Muhammad Ramzan Khushk, Advocate for petitioner. -.-.-. Learned counsel does not press this petition on the ground that his grievance has been resolved. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
